meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Escape Tutorial Hell (Freelancer Checklist)
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Use this intermediate guide to design with AI, leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By integrating AI-driven design workflows via Antigravity and Claude Code, you transition from passive learner to active builder. This checklist streamlines your development cycle, allowing you to generate production-ready code, iterate instantly, and deliver high-impact client work with professional velocity.
content.intro:
You are drowning in a sea of 'Build a To-Do List' videos, yet your client projects feel perpetually out of reach. The comfort of following a tutorial is a siren song that keeps you stagnant, masking the fear of building in the wild. You aren't learning; you're just transcribing.

It is time to pivot. By shifting your focus from 'how to code' to 'how to orchestrate AI,' you reclaim your time and authority. Using Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can bypass the tedious boilerplate and get straight to the value that actually pays your invoices.

steps.title: Define the Atomic Core
steps.description: Stop over-engineering. Define the single most important feature that solves the client's problem. Use AI to map the schema before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project requirement: [INSERT PROJECT]. Break it down into the smallest possible viable feature set and define the database schema for a Supabase backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create database schema based on the provided requirements document'

steps.title: Generate Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. This eliminates the 'blank page' syndrome and sets up your project structure correctly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Create the folder structure for a modular architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project scaffolding based on the antigravity output'

steps.title: Implement Component Logic
steps.description: Feed your UI requirements into Claude Code. Focus on functional, reusable components rather than pixel-perfect styling initially.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the logic for a secure authentication flow using NextAuth.js. Ensure all types are strictly defined in TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication flow and create the login component'

steps.title: Iterative Refinement Cycles
steps.description: Don't write code from scratch. Use Claude Code to refactor existing blocks and improve performance based on real-time feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current component code. Suggest three optimizations for better performance and reduced bundle size.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor the dashboard component to improve state management efficiency'

steps.title: Deployment Automation
steps.description: Package the project for production. Ensure CI/CD pipelines are configured to handle your specific stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration file that includes staging and production environment variables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup deployment scripts and verify build readiness'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to explain its architectural decisions before generating code to catch logic gaps early.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent naming conventions across large, multi-file projects.
Never accept the first output; ask the AI to 'critique its own code for security vulnerabilities' before committing.
Keep your Antigravity prompt library in a Notion database for instant access to common boilerplate patterns.
Treat your AI interactions as a code review process, not a copy-paste session; verify the logic manually.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, perform a post-mortem on your project. Identify which parts of the build were still manual and find an AI agent or script to automate those tasks in your next sprint.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting tutorials dictate your career growth. Take control of your workflow, ship faster than your competitors, and build the high-ticket SaaS products you were meant to create. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
